message:
fix(util): lowercase collision fallback suffix and multi-line list parsing

id.rs: Change the hard-stop collision fallback suffix from "FINAL"
(uppercase) to "final" (lowercase).  All other ID components are
lowercase by convention; the uppercase suffix was an inconsistency
that could cause confusing mixed-case IDs like "bd-abc2000-FINAL".

markdown_import.rs: Rewrite split_list_content to iterate per-line
before splitting on commas or whitespace.  The previous implementation
checked the entire content string for commas and chose one strategy
globally — a multi-line block like "cli, perf\nux" would split on
commas only, losing "ux" as a standalone token because there is no
comma on its line.  The new version applies the comma-vs-whitespace
heuristic independently to each line, correctly handling mixed
multi-line label/dep lists from markdown imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
